What does the Premium Plan include?
The Premium Plan includes unlimited camera support, 60-day storage history, advanced AI detection rules, and cellular backup. It is priced at $19.99 per month or $199.99 when billed annually.
How much does it cost annually?
The Premium Plan costs $199.99 when billed annually.
How much does standard shipping take?
Standard Ground Shipping takes 3 to 5 business days for delivery.
What does the Premium Plan include?

The Premium Plan offers unlimited camera support, 60-day storage history, advanced AI detection rules, and cellular backup. It is priced at $19.99 per month or $199.99 when billed annually.
What does the Premium Plan include?
The Premium Plan offers unlimited camera support, 60-day storage history, advanced AI detection rules, and cellular backup. It is priced at $19.99 per month or $199.99 when billed annually.
How much does the Premium Plan cost?
The Premium Plan costs $19.99 per month or $199.99 when billed annually.

How much is the Plus Plan per month?
The Plus Plan is $4.99 per month.
What are your prices?

TechMart offers various pricing options:

*   **Subscription Plans:**
    *   **Basic Plan:** Free.
    *   **Plus Plan:** $4.99 per month or $49.99 annually.
    *   **Premium Plan:** $19.99 per month or $199.99 annually.

*   **Shipping Policy:**
    *   **Standard Ground Shipping:** Free for orders totaling $50 or more; a flat rate of $5.99 for orders under $50.
    *   **Express Shipping:** Rates start at $14.99 and vary based on destination and package dimensions.
How much does it cost annually?
The Plus Plan costs $49.99 annually, and the Premium Plan costs $199.99 when billed annually.
How long does standard shipping take?
Standard Ground Shipping takes 3 to 5 business days for delivery.
What is the delivery time for express shipping?

How long does it take to get a refund?
The standard refund processing time is 7 to 10 business days for the credit to appear on the original payment method.
How many days for refund processing?
The standard refund processing time is 7 to 10 business days for the credit to appear on the original payment method.
What condition must returned items be in to get a refund?
To be eligible for a refund, the product must be in its original packaging, include all accessories, and be free from visible physical damage.
What is the return window if I miss the refund deadline?
If you miss the 45-day refund window, you may still return products within 90 days of purchase for store credit or product exchange.
Is there a restocking fee for open-box returns?
Please clarify your question.
How do I get an RMA number for a return?
You can generate an official Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number online through your TechMart Account Dashboard.
